title: A labeled evaluation corpus of representative support emails (with category, urgency, and a reference reply) is available or can be assembled before `EXP-001`.
statement: A labeled evaluation corpus of representative support emails (with category, urgency, and a reference reply) is available or can be assembled before `EXP-001`.
risk_if_wrong: No corpus ⇒ `EXP-001` cannot run ⇒ auto-send (`FR-008`) cannot be justified; accuracy (`NFR-001`) unverifiable.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "ASM-001", "Assumption": "A labeled evaluation corpus of representative support emails (with category, urgency, and a reference reply) is available or can be assembled before `EXP-001`.", "Basis": "Clarification batch Q4 ([given])", "Risk if wrong": "No corpus ⇒ `EXP-001` cannot run ⇒ auto-send (`FR-008`) cannot be justified; accuracy (`NFR-001`) unverifiable.", "Status": "Proposed"}}

title: Support Ops provides and owns the category + urgency taxonomy and the escalation rules.
statement: Support Ops provides and owns the category + urgency taxonomy and the escalation rules.
risk_if_wrong: A shifting or ill-defined taxonomy invalidates classification training/eval and routing (`FR-002`, `FR-005`).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "ASM-002", "Assumption": "Support Ops provides and owns the category + urgency taxonomy and the escalation rules.", "Basis": "Clarification batch Q6 ([given]); `STK-004`", "Risk if wrong": "A shifting or ill-defined taxonomy invalidates classification training/eval and routing (`FR-002`, `FR-005`).", "Status": "Proposed"}}

title: PII handling and retention follow the company security policy; security (`STK-002`) defines what counts as PII and where it may flow.
statement: PII handling and retention follow the company security policy; security (`STK-002`) defines what counts as PII and where it may flow.
risk_if_wrong: A misread policy risks a privacy breach (`INV-003`, `RISK-002`) or an over-restrictive design.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "ASM-003", "Assumption": "PII handling and retention follow the company security policy; security (`STK-002`) defines what counts as PII and where it may flow.", "Basis": "Clarification batch Q5 ([given]); `STK-002`", "Risk if wrong": "A misread policy risks a privacy breach (`INV-003`, `RISK-002`) or an over-restrictive design.", "Status": "Proposed"}}

title: The model provider is reached through a vendor-neutral abstraction; no provider-specific behavior is assumed in application code.
statement: The model provider is reached through a vendor-neutral abstraction; no provider-specific behavior is assumed in application code.
risk_if_wrong: Hidden coupling to one provider raises switching cost and lock-in (`RISK-004`, `CON-003`).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "ASM-004", "Assumption": "The model provider is reached through a vendor-neutral abstraction; no provider-specific behavior is assumed in application code.", "Basis": "Clarification batch Q7 (assumed)", "Risk if wrong": "Hidden coupling to one provider raises switching cost and lock-in (`RISK-004`, `CON-003`).", "Status": "Proposed"}}

title: The initial accuracy bar for `NFR-001` is ≥ 85% top-1 category accuracy on the eval set; the cost budget is ≤ $0.05/email.
statement: The initial accuracy bar for `NFR-001` is ≥ 85% top-1 category accuracy on the eval set; the cost budget is ≤ $0.05/email.
risk_if_wrong: A wrong bar mis-gates auto-send: too low ships unsafe automation, too high blocks viable automation (`FR-008`, `EXP-001`).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "ASM-005", "Assumption": "The initial accuracy bar for `NFR-001` is ≥ 85% top-1 category accuracy on the eval set; the cost budget is ≤ $0.05/email.", "Basis": "Clarification batch Q1 ([given]); Q3 (assumed)", "Risk if wrong": "A wrong bar mis-gates auto-send: too low ships unsafe automation, too high blocks viable automation (`FR-008`, `EXP-001`).", "Status": "Proposed"}}
